What is Apollo.io?
Apollo is a sales intelligence and engagement platform designed to empower sales teams and marketers with the tools they need to find, engage, and convert prospects efficiently. By leveraging a vast database of over 210 million contacts and 35 million companies, Apollo provides un…

// This script fixes external links that incorrectly have the dev center URL as the base_url
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  // Find all links that start with /http or /https
  const externalLinks = document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="/http"]');
  
  externalLinks.forEach(function(link) {
    // Get the current href
    const currentHref = link.getAttribute('href');
    
    // Remove the leading slash to fix the URL
    const correctedHref = currentHref.substring(1);
    
    // Update the href attribute
    link.href = correctedHref;
    
    // Add click event listener
    link.addEventListener("click", function (event) {
      event.preventDefault();
      window.open(correctedHref, "_blank");
    });
  });
});

class="SuperHubDoc-article3ArTrEavUTKg rm-Article rm-Guides-SuperHub"><header id="content-head"><div class="row clearfix"><div class="col-xs-9"><h1>APIs Overview</h1></div></div></header><div class="grid-container-fluid" id="content-container"><section class="content-body grid-75 "><div class="rm-Markdown markdown-body rm-Markdown markdown-body ng-non-bindable" data-testid="RDMD" style="margin-left: 31px;"><style data-tailwind-stylesheet="true"></style><h2 class="heading heading-2 header-scroll"><div class="heading-anchor anchor waypoint" id="what-is-apolloio"></div><div class="heading-text">What is Apollo.io?</div><a aria-label="Skip link to What is Apollo.io?" class="heading-anchor-icon fa fa-regular fa-anchor" href="#what-is-apolloio"></a></h2>
<p>Apollo is a sales intelligence and engagement platform designed to empower sales teams and marketers with the tools they need to find, engage, and convert prospects efficiently. By leveraging a vast database of over 210 million contacts and 35 million companies, Apollo provides unparalleled access to detailed business information and advanced search capabilities.</p>
<h2 class="heading heading-2 header-scroll"><div class="heading-anchor anchor waypoint" id="introduction-to-apollos-apis"></div><div class="heading-text">Introduction to Apollo's APIs</div><a aria-label="Skip link to Introduction to Apollo's APIs" class="heading-anchor-icon fa fa-regular fa-anchor" href="#introduction-to-apollos-apis"></a></h2>
<p>The REST API provides a variety of opportunities for you to interact with Apollo’s platform functionality and data. Your organization’s API access is restricted by your current Apollo plan.</p>
<p>Use cases for Apollo's APIs include, but are not limited to:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Build integrations</strong>: Integrate Apollo’s data and features in your own integrations. Use an OAuth 2.0 authorization flow to gain permission to query the endpoints you need on behalf of mutual users. The API offers the ability to retrieve data, create accounts, interact with sequences, and more!</li>
<li><strong>Enrich data</strong>: Use the <a target="_self" href="/reference/people-enrichment">Enrichment endpoints</a> to perform data enrichment for both people and organizations. Enrich the data of an individual person or organization, or enrich data in bulk.</li>
<li><strong>Find people</strong>: Use the <a target="_self" href="/reference/people-api-search">People API Search endpoint</a> to search Apollo's data to find exact prospects based on demographics filters, including job titles, locations, and seniority.</li>
</ul>
<h2 class="heading heading-2 header-scroll"><div class="heading-anchor anchor waypoint" id="see-apollos-apis-in-action"></div><div class="heading-text">See Apollo's APIs in Action</div><a aria-label="Skip link to See Apollo's APIs in Action" class="heading-anchor-icon fa fa-regular fa-anchor" href="#see-apollos-apis-in-action"></a></h2>
<iframe href="https://fast.wistia.net/embed/iframe/4rxjrlriwo" src="https://fast.wistia.net/embed/iframe/4rxjrlriwo" style="border-width: medium; border-style: none; border-color: currentcolor; border-image: initial; display: flex; margin: auto; width: 100%; height: 455px;"></iframe>
<h2 class="heading heading-2 header-scroll"><div class="heading-anchor anchor waypoint" id="ready-to-explore-apollos-apis"></div><div class="heading-text">Ready to Explore Apollo's APIs?</div><a aria-label="Skip link to Ready to Explore Apollo's APIs?" class="heading-anchor-icon fa fa-regular fa-anchor" href="#ready-to-explore-apollos-apis"></a></h2>
<p>Whether you’re a customer that wants to access data via Apollo or you want to partner with Apollo to build integrations, Apollo’s API resources will guide you through the available endpoints, sample requests/responses, use cases, and more!</p>
<p>If you're <strong>new to Apollo</strong>, <a target="_self" href="https://www.apollo.io/sign-up?utm_medium=partner&utm_source=tech_DeveloperHub&utm_campaign=API">get started with an account today</a> to start exploring our APIs.</p>
<p>If you’re a <strong>customer</strong> that wants to access Apollo’s data or other platform functionality, you should start by <a target="_self" href="/docs/create-api-key">creating an API key</a>.</p>
<p>If you want to <strong>partner</strong> with Apollo to build an integration, you need to build an <a target="_self" href="/docs/use-oauth-20-authorization-flow-to-access-apollo-user-information-partners">OAuth 2.0 authorization flow</a> to retrieve data on behalf of mutual customers.</p>
<p>And regardless of your use case, Apollo’s <a target="_self" href="/reference/authentication">reference docs</a> detail the functionality of each endpoint, including example requests and responses.</p></div><div align="center" class="Flex Flex_row " justify="between" style="--flex-gap:var(--md)"><div class="UpdatedAt"><p class="DateLine "><i class="icon icon-watch"></i>Updated<!-- --> <!-- -->1 day ago<!-- --> </p></div></div><hr class="NextStepsDivider"><div class="WhatsNext-wrapper3DTnpcPqKoHg"><header align="center" class="Flex Flex_row APISectionHeader3LN_-QIR0m7x APISectionHeader_title2JS7xZ_m-HAv rm-APISectionHeader WhatsNext-headingQHN33r4trf_s" justify="between" style="--flex-gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap"><div class="APISectionHeader-heading4MUMLbp4_nLs APISectionHeader-heading_title15Zd6rYplxPq">What’s Next</div></header><div class="rm-Markdown markdown-body WhatsNext-description1zZyZLPCGmaa WhatsNext-description_empty1Hh8M1AKGhbW" data-testid="RDMD"></div><ul><li><a class="WhatsNext-link" target="_self" href="/docs/create-api-key">Create API Keys</a><span class="IconWrapper Icon-wrapper2z2wVIeGsiUy"><svg fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" class="Icon Icon3_D2ysxFZ_ll Icon-svg2Lm7f6G9Ly5a icon" data-name="arrow-right" role="img" aria-hidden="true" style="--icon-color: inherit;
